# GitHub Workflows

## Purpose

Reserve a location for GitHub Actions workflow definitions. No CI implementation is included in v0.2.

## Scope

**In scope:**

- Planned workflow categories
- Naming conventions for future workflow files
- Integration points with validation and FSL milestones

**Out of scope:**

- Active CI/CD pipelines
- Automated testing or deployment

## Sections to be Completed

- [ ] Markdown lint workflow (planned)
- [ ] FSL schema validation workflow (planned, v0.7)
- [ ] Link checking workflow (planned)
- [ ] Release automation workflow (planned, v1.0)
